title: Portable Outdoor Camping Survival Wire Hand Saw Two 35 cm Blades
description:
There are many situations you might find yourself in where you could really use a saw, but the idea of just carrying one around in your backpack just doesn't seem that practical. Portable Wire Hand Saws are a great alternative to their large and bulky alternatives. This pack includes two 35cm wire blades with 2 durable handles, making it extremely easy to pack and carry wherever you go. The blades are sharp enough to cut through various types of wood and foliage but packs nicely into a storage pouch when it is not in use. Great for camping, hiking, gardening, and any activity that requires a portable sawing tool.
